data.card_skill:
On Play Play up to 1 Battle Card with a cost of 1 or less from your hand.
When Attacking If your Leader is <Trunks: Future>, choose all Battle Cards in your opponent's Battle Area and reduce their costs by 2 for the turn. Then, choose up to 1 Battle Card with a cost of 1 or less in a Battle Area and return it to its owner's hand.
